changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-fields/src/types.rs:134-141,155-162

Coverage: 63.6% (21/33 lines)

Uncovered match arms in effective_editor() and effective_display() when editor/display is None:
- FieldType::Text → Markdown / Text
- FieldType::Markdown → Markdown / Markdown
- FieldType::Color → ColorPalette / ColorSwatch
- FieldType::Select → Select / Badge
- FieldType::MultiSelect → MultiSelect / BadgeList
- FieldType::Reference(multiple:true) → MultiSelect / BadgeList

The existing tests only cover Date, Number, Reference(single), and Computed. Need tests for Text, Markdown, Color, Select, MultiSelect, and Reference(multiple) field types with no explicit editor/display set. #coverage-gap
Add tests for FieldDef::effective_editor/display uncovered match arms
